understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` by navigating through a grid of tiles while avoiding spikes, using gravity-driven movement and clickable breakable blocks to create paths.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal moves (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) cause the player to fall in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile or hitting a hazard. CLICK removes breakable blocks (`x`) to open fall paths. Spikes end the run. The level had gravity DOWN, so the player fell toward lower y values after each move. Multiple moves and clicks were used to descend through the level by removing blocks and moving into new columns to fall further.
